caption.full:
Scrubs Season 2 adds Rachel Bilson and expands Neil Flynn's role

Rachel Bilson is returning for a multi-episode arc in the upcoming season. Neil Flynn's role has also been expanded for Season 2. Joel Kim Booster and X Mayo will be departing the show.

Send this to your favorite Scrubs fan!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

facebook.text: Scrubs Season 2 is expanding its cast with Rachel Bilson joining for a multi-episode arc. Neil Flynn will also return in an expanded recurring role. The new season premieres February 25th on ABC. What are you most excited to see?

youtube.title: Scrubs Season 2: Rachel Bilson Joins, Flynn Returns
youtube.description:
Scrubs Season 2 adds Rachel Bilson for a multi-episode arc and expands Neil Flynn's role. Zach Braff, Donald Faison, and Sarah Chalke return as series regulars, while intern Ava Bunn is promoted. Joel Kim Booster and X Mayo are departing the show.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
